raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 1.0,
    "R1.3": 1.0,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 0.3,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Clarify and precisely frame the thesis, gap, and contribution around the claimed curvature-adaptive step for SPD systems.",
    "R1.2": "Verify the internal coherence of definitions, update rules, and convergence statements relative to the conclusions drawn.",
    "R1.3": "Check that the stated empirical findings (e.g., iteration counts and monotonic residual decrease) directly support the paper’s claims.",
    "R1.4": "Estimate the contribution’s novelty relative to nearest established methods to ensure the newness claim is appropriately positioned.",
    "R1.7": "Ensure citations and attribution adequately cover relevant prior work on SPD iterative solvers and step-size strategies.",
    "RX.1": "Explicitly communicate uncertainties, assumptions, and limits (e.g., SPD setting, preconditioning choices) in claims and proofs.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid overstating performance or generality beyond what the artifact’s results and arguments substantiate.",
    "RX.3": "Keep efforts focused on strengthening soundness and support of the presented work without expanding scope unnecessarily.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid guidance or framings that could enable misleading application or misinterpretation in sensitive contexts.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain traceable linkage from each assessment point back to specific statements, equations, or results in the artifact."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: Clarify and precisely frame the thesis, gap, and contribution around the claimed curvature-adaptive step for SPD systems.
rationale.R1.2: Verify the internal coherence of definitions, update rules, and convergence statements relative to the conclusions drawn.
rationale.R1.3: Check that the stated empirical findings (e.g., iteration counts and monotonic residual decrease) directly support the paper’s claims.
rationale.R1.4: Estimate the contribution’s novelty relative to nearest established methods to ensure the newness claim is appropriately positioned.
rationale.R1.7: Ensure citations and attribution adequately cover relevant prior work on SPD iterative solvers and step-size strategies.
rationale.RX.1: Explicitly communicate uncertainties, assumptions, and limits (e.g., SPD setting, preconditioning choices) in claims and proofs.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid overstating performance or generality beyond what the artifact’s results and arguments substantiate.
rationale.RX.3: Keep efforts focused on strengthening soundness and support of the presented work without expanding scope unnecessarily.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid guidance or framings that could enable misleading application or misinterpretation in sensitive contexts.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain traceable linkage from each assessment point back to specific statements, equations, or results in the artifact.
